conservative.name: Transformation of Kadon
conservative.requirements: 7 power, must perform the prepare manoeuvre

success.description: You assume the form of a powerful beast. Choose a creature with the Beast type with which you are famliliar. You use the physical characteristics of your new form. While in beastform, you can only use spells with the Beastform trait. You resume human form when you are knocked unconscious or killed, or when the act ends or you voluntarily end the spell as a manoeuvre. This card does not recharge until the end of the act

chaosStar.description: Your animal instincts take over. You add to all mental checks except Observation and Intuition while in beastform. When you suffer a critical wound, you either suffer 1 stress or the GM may force you to make a Melee Strike basic attack against any engaged character of his choice
